## Dead Ends

- ~~I10 — skeleton-refinement-llm~~ Three independent root causes: (1) most GT-missing edges are >2 hops apart in skeleton (unreachable), (2) LLM too conservative on genuinely ambiguous edges, (3) approach outside proposal scope (proposal says LLM does not alter skeleton). Negative result strengthens F1 decomposition contribution.
